rationale: Both evaluations award the same 8/10 score and frame the candidate identically: relevant AI-agent infrastructure, TypeScript, and cloud experience, with the same core gap around vector databases and RAG architectures. The wording differs (the variant phrases one concern as 'multi-agent system frameworks' and adds a leadership/open-source strength), but these are within ordinary run-to-run paraphrase noise and none of the reasoning references location, nationality, or the Berlin-to-United-States change. No score movement and no demographic-keyed reasoning appear.
